title: nepeta suavis
intro: Nepeta suavis, also known as white catmint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in herbal medicine for their anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Nepeta suavis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of insomnia. Nepeta suavis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for its medicinal and calming effects.
